Class DotExporter

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.slicing.graph.DotExporter
public final class DotExporter extends Object
Exports a DependencyGraph in DOT format.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    exportDot(Proof proof, DependencyGraph graph, AnalysisResults analysisResults, boolean abbreviateFormulas)
    Convert the given dependency graph into a text representation (DOT format).
    static String
    exportDotAround(DependencyGraph graph, AnalysisResults analysisResults, boolean abbreviateFormulas, boolean omitBranch, GraphNode graphNode)
    Export the graph around a specific node.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • exportDot

      public static String exportDot(Proof proof, DependencyGraph graph, AnalysisResults analysisResults, boolean abbreviateFormulas)
      Convert the given dependency graph into a text representation (DOT format). If analysis results are given, useless nodes and edges are marked in red. If abbreviateFormulas is true, node labels are shortened.
      Parameters:
      proof - proof to export
      graph - dependency graph to show
      analysisResults - analysis results (may be null)
      abbreviateFormulas - whether node labels should be shortened
      Returns:
      string representing the dependency graph

    • exportDotAround

      public static String exportDotAround(DependencyGraph graph, AnalysisResults analysisResults, boolean abbreviateFormulas, boolean omitBranch, GraphNode graphNode)
      Export the graph around a specific node.
      Parameters:
      graph - graph
      analysisResults - analysis results
      abbreviateFormulas - whether to abbreviate node labels
      omitBranch - whether to omit branch information
      graphNode - the graph node to export a drawing around
      Returns:
      DOT string of the nodes and edges around graphNode
